arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo branded 'embarrassing' in comparison with Jude Bellingham
arts.sum: Cristiano Ronaldo has come under fire for his petulant behaviour following Al Nassr team-mate Jhon Duran's sending off as he kicked a ball into the stands and reprimanded the referee, but was spared any punishment

arts.ttl: How Barcelona & Real Madrid have reacted to news of Joshua Kimmich’s Bayern contract situation
arts.sum: An insight into the stance of the brass at Spanish football’s two biggest clubs when it comes to the potential signing of Bayern Munich star Joshua Kimmich has been forthcoming…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star’s international return confirmed
arts.sum: Belgium head coach Rudi Garcia has on Friday confirmed the imminent return of Real Madrid star Thibaut Courtois to the country’s national setup. Goalkeeper Courtois, for his part, has not…

arts.ttl: Official: Real Betis confirm Barcelona star Vitor Roque’s departure
arts.sum: La Liga outfit Real Betis have on Friday announced the immediate departure of striker Vitor Roque. This comes ahead of the youngster’s imminent return to Brazil, with Palmeiras. Roque’s name…

arts.ttl: Real Madrid hit with partial stadium closure and UEFA fine over 'discriminatory' fan behaviour during Man City clash
arts.sum: Los Blancos supporters who attended the Champions League game at the Santiago Bernabeu have landed in hot water

arts.ttl: Theo Hernandez: Man City, Real Madrid handed huge transfer boost in pursuit of AC Milan left-back
arts.sum: AC Milan technical director Geoffrey Moncada hints that the Serie A club could sell Man City and Real Madrid-linked Theo Hernandez this summer if the left-back does not extend his contract.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid boss Ancelotti provides Federico Valverde injury update
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has provided an update on the wellbeing of midfield star Federico Valverde. The name of Uruguayan international Valverde has of course taken its place…

arts.ttl: Neymar opens up on rejecting Real Madrid for Barcelona: ‘I’d have made 3 times more money’
arts.sum: Former Barcelona star Neymar Jr. has this week provided an insight into the reasoning behind his decision to reject the advances of Real Madrid, in favour of joining the Blaugrana.…

arts.ttl: Ancelotti urges refs to stop insults to Asencio
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti has said that opposition supporters must stop chanting insults at defender Raúl Asencio.

arts.ttl: Carlo Ancelotti confirms Fede Valverde absence and discusses Dani Ceballos alternatives – ‘I’ll be polite’
arts.sum: Real Madrid seemed to have finally found some balance in midfield this season, with Dani Ceballos playing an orchestrating role alongside Aurelien Tchouameni. However Carlo Ancelotti will now be forced to reconstruct the platform for their attacks, after Ceballos was ruled out for two months on Thursday.
